---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug in Veritas
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Submit a URL / file / text '...'
3. See error '...'

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | (e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04) |
| Python version | (e.g. 3.11.8) |
| Node version | (e.g. 20.11.0) |
| Running via | Docker / Manual / Other |
| Browser (if UI bug) | (e.g. Chrome 122) |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
